paragraphs.text: I am Vaishnavi Singh. I study {Computing and Law|BSc Computing and Law with a double major in Political Science} at SMU, graduating at the end of 2026. My work spans AI safety and governance.

On the research side: I am an incoming {LawAI Fellow|Institute of Law and AI LawAI Fellow, Legal Frontiers stream, in person from January to May 2027} and attending the {LFAI Workshop|Institute of Law and AI LFAI Workshop at Jesus College, Cambridge, from June 10 to 13, 2026}. Alumna of {OAISI|the Oxford AI Safety Initiative, where I completed the ARENA 7.0 curriculum and contributed ML engineering to AI safety research at ARBOx3} and {BASIS Berkeley|the Berkeley AI Safety Student Initiative, where I worked on AI moral status and personhood, resulting in a paper accepted to the FAST Workshop at AAAI 2026}.

In industry: I was at {Confide|Confide Platform (2024 to May 2026), where I built an AI governance product covering policy generation, evaluation tooling, and incident reporting}, and previously worked in technology risk at {KPMG|KPMG Technology Risk Advisory, reviewing AI systems against the EU AI Act, NIST RMF, and related standards}.
